base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of roly_poly_rolypoly_and_roly_bomber — a character from 1995 chrono trigger. Roly, Poly, Rolypoly & Roly Bomber. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
